title: Collection sizes and array length comparisons should make sense
description: Comparisons against collection sizes or array lengths should be sensible. This rule checks for meaningless comparisons.
message: Collection size comparison does not make sense.

noncompliant.description: Comparing lengths with an intermediate value.

why_is_this_an_issue: Comparisons involving collection sizes or array lengths that are meaningless can lead to logical errors.
how_to_fix: Ensure comparisons are logical and make sense in the context of the code.
